contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.

(** * The direct sum of short exact sequences *)

(** Biproducts of abelian groups preserve exactness. *)

goals.conclusion: IsExact (Tr (-1)) (functor_ab_biprod i j) (functor_ab_biprod p q)
IsExact (Tr (-1)) (functor_ab_biprod i j) (functor_ab_biprod p q)
IsComplex (functor_ab_biprod i j) (functor_ab_biprod p q)
ReflectiveSubuniverse.IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) (cxfib ?cx_isexact)
IsComplex (functor_ab_biprod i j) (functor_ab_biprod p q)
IsHSet (ab_biprod B Y)
functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j == pconst
functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j == pconst
p (i (fst x)) = 0
q (j (snd x)) = 0
p (i (fst x)) = 0
q (j (snd x)) = 0

ReflectiveSubuniverse.IsConnMap (Tr (-1))
  (cxfib
     (phomotopy_homotopy_hset
        ((fun x : ab_biprod A X =>
          path_prod ((functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j) x)
            (pconst x)
            ((let X0 := cx_isexact in let X1 := pointed_fun X0 in X1 (fst x))
             :
             fst ((functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j) x) =
             fst (pconst x))
            ((let X0 := cx_isexact in let X1 := pointed_fun X0 in X1 (snd x))
             :
             snd ((functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j) x) =
             snd (pconst x)))
         :
         functor_ab_biprod p q o* functor_ab_biprod i j == pconst)))

ReflectiveSubuniverse.IsConnected (Tr (-1))
  (hfiber
     (fun x : A * X =>
      ((i (fst x), j (snd x));
      path_prod (p (i (fst x)), q (j (snd x))) (0, 0) 
        (cx_isexact (fst x)) (cx_isexact (snd x))))
     ((e, f); u))

Tr (-1)
  (hfiber
     (fun x : A * X =>
      ((i (fst x), j (snd x));
      path_prod (p (i (fst x)), q (j (snd x))) (0, 0) 
        (cx_isexact (fst x)) (cx_isexact (snd x))))
     ((e, f); u))

Tr (-1)
  (hfiber
     (fun x : A * X =>
      ((i (fst x), j (snd x));
      path_prod (p (i (fst x)), q (j (snd x))) (0, 0) 
        (cx_isexact (fst x)) (cx_isexact (snd x))))
     ((e, f); u))

contents: pose proof (a := isexact_preimage _ i p e (fst U)).

goals.conclusion:
Tr (-1)
  (hfiber
     (fun x : A * X =>
      ((i (fst x), j (snd x));
      path_prod (p (i (fst x)), q (j (snd x))) (0, 0) 
        (cx_isexact (fst x)) (cx_isexact (snd x))))
     ((e, f); u))

contents: pose proof (x := isexact_preimage _ j q f (snd U)).

goals.conclusion:
Tr (-1)
  (hfiber
     (fun x0 : A * X =>
      ((i (fst x0), j (snd x0));
      path_prod (p (i (fst x0)), q (j (snd x0))) (0, 0) 
        (cx_isexact (fst x0)) (cx_isexact (snd x0))))
     ((e, f); u))

hfiber
  (fun x0 : A * X =>
   ((i (fst x0), j (snd x0));
   path_prod (p (i (fst x0)), q (j (snd x0))) (0, 0) 
     (cx_isexact (fst x0)) (cx_isexact (snd x0))))
  ((e, f); u)

((i (a.1 + group_unit), j (group_unit + x.1));
path_prod (p (i (a.1 + group_unit)), q (j (group_unit + x.1))) 
  (0, 0) (cx_isexact (a.1 + group_unit)) (cx_isexact (group_unit + x.1))) =
((e, f); u)

((i (a.1 + group_unit), j (group_unit + x.1));
path_prod (p (i (a.1 + group_unit)), q (j (group_unit + x.1))) 
  (0, 0) (cx_isexact (a.1 + group_unit)) (cx_isexact (group_unit + x.1))) =
((e, f); u)

contents: (* This hint speeds up the next line. *)

goals.conclusion: (i (a.1 + group_unit), j (group_unit + x.1)) = (e, f)
i (a.1 + group_unit) = e
j (group_unit + x.1) = f
i (a.1 + group_unit) = e
i a.1 = e
j (group_unit + x.1) = f
j x.1 = f

contents: (** The pointwise direct sum of two short exact sequences. *)

Definition abses_direct_sum `{Funext} {B A B' A' : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A) (F : AbSES B' A')
  : AbSES (ab_biprod B B') (ab_biprod A A')
  := Build_AbSES (ab_biprod E F)
                 (functor_ab_biprod (inclusion E) (inclusion F))
                 (functor_ab_biprod (projection E) (projection F))
                 (functor_ab_biprod_embedding _ _)
                 (functor_ab_biprod_surjection _ _)
                 (ab_biprod_exact _ _ _ _).
(** For any short exact sequences [E], [E'], [F], [F'], and morphisms [f : E -> E'] and [g : F -> F'] there is a morphism [E + F -> E' + F']. *)

goals.conclusion: AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E F) (abses_direct_sum E' F')
AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E F) (abses_direct_sum E' F')
ab_biprod A C $-> ab_biprod A' C'
abses_direct_sum E F $-> abses_direct_sum E' F'
ab_biprod B D $-> ab_biprod B' D'

inclusion (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o ?component1 ==
?component2 $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum E F)

projection (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o ?component2 ==
?component3 $o projection (abses_direct_sum E F)
ab_biprod A C $-> ab_biprod A' C'
abses_direct_sum E F $-> abses_direct_sum E' F'
ab_biprod B D $-> ab_biprod B' D'

inclusion (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o
functor_ab_biprod (component1 f) (component1 g) ==
functor_ab_biprod (component2 f) (component2 g) $o
inclusion (abses_direct_sum E F)

(inclusion (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o
 functor_ab_biprod (component1 f) (component1 g)) x =
(functor_ab_biprod (component2 f) (component2 g) $o
 inclusion (abses_direct_sum E F)) x

projection (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o
functor_ab_biprod (component2 f) (component2 g) ==
functor_ab_biprod (component3 f) (component3 g) $o
projection (abses_direct_sum E F)

(projection (abses_direct_sum E' F') $o
 functor_ab_biprod (component2 f) (component2 g)) x =
(functor_ab_biprod (component3 f) (component3 g) $o
 projection (abses_direct_sum E F)) x

contents: (** For any short exact sequence [E], there is a morphism [E -> abses_direct_sum E E], where each component is ab_diagonal. *)

Definition abses_diagonal `{Funext} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : AbSESMorphism E (abses_direct_sum E E).

goals.conclusion: AbSESMorphism E (abses_direct_sum E E)
AbSESMorphism E (abses_direct_sum E E)
A $-> ab_biprod A A
E $-> abses_direct_sum E E
B $-> ab_biprod B B
inclusion (abses_direct_sum E E) $o ?component1 == ?component2 $o inclusion E

projection (abses_direct_sum E E) $o ?component2 ==
?component3 $o projection E
inclusion (abses_direct_sum E E) $o ab_diagonal == ab_diagonal $o inclusion E

projection (abses_direct_sum E E) $o ab_diagonal ==
ab_diagonal $o projection E

contents: (** For any short exact sequence [E], there is dually a morphism [abses_direct_sum E E -> E], with each component being the codiagonal. *)

Definition abses_codiagonal `{Funext} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E E) E.

goals.conclusion: AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E E) E
AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E E) E
ab_biprod A A $-> A
abses_direct_sum E E $-> E
ab_biprod B B $-> B
inclusion E $o ?component1 == ?component2 $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum E E)

projection E $o ?component2 ==
?component3 $o projection (abses_direct_sum E E)

inclusion E $o ab_codiagonal ==
ab_codiagonal $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum E E)

projection E $o ab_codiagonal ==
ab_codiagonal $o projection (abses_direct_sum E E)

contents: all: intro x; cbn; apply grp_homo_op.
(** There is always a morphism [abses_direct_sum E F -> abses_direct_sum F E] of short exact sequences, for any [E : AbSES B A] and [F : AbSES B' A']. *)

goals.conclusion: AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E F) (abses_direct_sum F E)
AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum E F) (abses_direct_sum F E)
ab_biprod A A' $-> ab_biprod A' A
abses_direct_sum E F $-> abses_direct_sum F E
ab_biprod B B' $-> ab_biprod B' B

inclusion (abses_direct_sum F E) $o ?component1 ==
?component2 $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum E F)

projection (abses_direct_sum F E) $o ?component2 ==
?component3 $o projection (abses_direct_sum E F)

inclusion (abses_direct_sum F E) $o direct_sum_swap ==
direct_sum_swap $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum E F)

projection (abses_direct_sum F E) $o direct_sum_swap ==
direct_sum_swap $o projection (abses_direct_sum E F)

contents: (** For [E, F, G : AbSES B A], there is a morphism [(E + F) + G -> (G + F) + E] induced by the above map, where [+] denotes [abses_direct_sum]. *)

Lemma abses_twist_directsum `{Funext} {A B : AbGroup} (E F G : AbSES B A)
  : AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)
                  (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E).

goals.conclusion:
AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E)

AbSESMorphism (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E)
ab_biprod (ab_biprod A A) A $-> ab_biprod (ab_biprod A A) A

abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G $->
abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E
ab_biprod (ab_biprod B B) B $-> ab_biprod (ab_biprod B B) B

inclusion (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E) $o ?component1 ==
?component2 $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)

projection (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E) $o ?component2 ==
?component3 $o projection (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)

inclusion (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E) $o ab_biprod_twist ==
ab_biprod_twist $o inclusion (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)

projection (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E) $o ab_biprod_twist ==
ab_biprod_twist $o projection (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)
